website_contact_form.description: Sample payload from website contact form

payload.message: We're a fast-growing startup looking for a scalable CRM solution. Currently using spreadsheets but need something more robust. Would love to schedule a demo.

payload.message: Met at TechConf 2024. VP of Sales at Fortune 500 company. Very interested in our enterprise package. Follow up by Friday.
payload.notes: Hot lead - decision maker, budget approved, timeline: Q1 2024

payload.message: Olá! I saw your ad on Instagram. I need a CRM for my team of 10 sales reps. What are your prices?
